canonical_desc: Sky full of moving white strands forming into a ball of light; clear vs cloudy sky
adjudicator_note: Same sky/light-ball passage; B split it into two excerpts but it is one scene. Classification disagreement on illusion vs full-blown immersive.

canonical_desc: Living in a 3-second dream-delay; cannot live in the present
adjudicator_note: B treats the dream-delay experience as a nonsensory hallucination; A did not code it as a scene.

canonical_desc: In bathroom mirror sees a bald ~6' man who talks about life and death
adjudicator_note: Same mirror-man passage. A codes many attributes (incrusted, unknown person, modal status, religious insight); B codes only as full-blown immersive. Major classification disagreement on type-of-visual-alteration.

canonical_desc: Blurriness and colors changing, not mixing
adjudicator_note: Same excerpt. A reads it as an illusion of color; B reads it as a geometrical-pattern hallucination. Disagreement on modality + type-of-alteration.

canonical_desc: Laws of physics changed, faces changed, unseen rooms mapped to his home
adjudicator_note: A scene-codes this as an illusion. B codes the same passage as trip-level 'Delusional' (see trip-level b04), not as a perceptual scene.

canonical_desc: Person in his room switches between a 12-year-old girl and his mother
adjudicator_note: Same switching-person passage. Disagreement on whether it's an illusion (A) or an incrusted-object hallucination (B).

canonical_desc: Couch appears covered in spiders, centipedes, rollypolys and other insects
adjudicator_note: Same couch-insects passage; B split into two excerpts of the same scene. Both agree on incrusted+insect; A adds modal-status 'possible/probable event' which B omits.

canonical_desc: Mini-trips of giant shiny spiders seen only in reflected light
adjudicator_note: Same shiny-spiders-in-reflections passage. Both code insect; disagreement incrusted vs detached. A adds modal-status.

canonical_desc: Smoked Brugmansia leaves make him see strange colors briefly
adjudicator_note: B codes the brief colour-seeing as an illusion; A did not individuate.

canonical_desc: Feeling of being in the wrong place / dislocation
adjudicator_note: B codes this feeling of dislocation as an impossible-event modal-status entry; A codes the same sentence at trip-level (sense of strangeness) — see trip-level section.

canonical_desc: Another friend talking who wasn't really there
adjudicator_note: A codes this as an incrusted hallucination of an acquaintance; B did not.

canonical_desc: Fake inmate friend in the police car who later vanishes
adjudicator_note: A codes this vividly hallucinated inmate; B did not individuate, though the narrative is explicit ('never there in the first place').

canonical_desc: People visiting his jail cell who weren't there
adjudicator_note: A codes the jail-cell visitors hallucination; B did not.

canonical_desc: Post-trip inability to parse letters into words
adjudicator_note: B codes the reading impairment as a visual illusion; A did not. Whether this is really a hallucinatory scene is debatable — it is a perceptual deficit rather than added content.

canonical_desc: On the drive home, sees snakes everywhere on the road
adjudicator_note: Same snakes-on-road passage. Agreement on incrusted-object; A additionally codes animal-other + modal status.

canonical_desc: Believes he is wearing a shirt and scrapes his chest pulling at skin as if it were fabric
adjudicator_note: Same shirt passage. A codes as incrusted-object hallucination of a shirt (and clothes leaf); B codes as illusion (a misperception of the existing body). Classification disagreement on type-of-alteration.

canonical_desc: Fighting someone imagined in his room; asks roommate for help
adjudicator_note: Same fighting-someone passage. Both code unknown-person; A adds incrusted + modal status.

canonical_desc: Multicolored face emerges from shadow in corner of room
adjudicator_note: Same face-in-corner passage. Classification disagreement: A=detached, B=incrusted.

canonical_desc: Green/yellow waves of light on ceiling; doily patterns; pink/green/blue drops on walls
adjudicator_note: Same ceiling-patterns passage. A=illusion, B=geometrical pattern — classic illusion-vs-hallucination disagreement.

canonical_desc: Washcloth in shower appears as torn piece of face with eye still in socket
adjudicator_note: Same passage. A=illusion (object misperceived), B=incrusted (object added).

canonical_desc: Screw in shower ceiling grows legs and sniffs around; looks like a spider
adjudicator_note: Same screw-spider passage; B split into two excerpts of the same scene. A=illusion; B=incrusted + insect leaf. Disagreement on alteration type + B codes the spider as an actual object class.

canonical_desc: Hands look red in the shower (like niacin flush)
adjudicator_note: A scene-codes the red-hands observation as illusion; B did not individuate (arguably a borderline somatic/perceptual thing).

canonical_desc: Writing on shower wall: 'you are not...', fades when approached
adjudicator_note: A picks up the shower-wall writing; B did not.

canonical_desc: Lying on bed watching 'all sorts of things' fly by
adjudicator_note: B treats the 'things flying by' line as a detached-object scene; A did not.

canonical_desc: Sees smoke and an imagined burning cigarette on desk; reaches for it repeatedly
adjudicator_note: Same cigarette-smoke scene. Both agree incrusted. A adds artefact leaf + modal status.

canonical_desc: Hallucinated music playing from his stereo / radio
adjudicator_note: Phantom-music scene. A provides two excerpts; both raters agree on auditory/artefact. A adds modal status.

canonical_desc: Sherlock Holmes standing at his bedroom door when he opens it
adjudicator_note: Same Sherlock scene. Disagreement on human-subtype (celebrity vs historical figure — both debatable for a fictional detective). A adds incrusted + impossible-event.

canonical_desc: Text on screen turns into shifting colours
adjudicator_note: A codes the shifting-text colours; B did not.

canonical_desc: A spider builds a web across the bottom of his monitor; disappears when looked at
adjudicator_note: Same spider-on-monitor scene. Both agree insect. A adds incrusted + modal.

canonical_desc: Sinister growl from under his bed
adjudicator_note: Same growl scene. Both agree auditory-animal but disagree on mammal vs other leaf.

canonical_desc: A penny levitates from behind monitor and lands silently on top
adjudicator_note: Same flying-penny scene. Both agree incrusted. A also classifies object as tool/cloth (questionable fit — a penny is currency) and adds impossible-event.

canonical_desc: Walls appear projected on a moving backdrop; assume pink-red colour
Hears a loud crash near his bed (no apparent source)
adjudicator_note: A codes the crash as an auditory hallucination; B does not.

canonical_desc: Lights start to appear brighter
adjudicator_note: A codes the brightening lights as illusion; B does not.

canonical_desc: Depth perception gone; eyes cannot focus; retinas hurt despite sunglasses
adjudicator_note: Same passage. Full agreement on illusion.

canonical_desc: Everything touched feels strangely new (tactile)
adjudicator_note: B codes a tactile-novelty sensation; A did not. NB: worksheet fuzzy-match score was only 50 — the exact excerpt may have been a paraphrase.

canonical_desc: Water bottle disappears as it gets to his mouth
adjudicator_note: A codes vanishing bottle as incrusted hallucination; B does not.

canonical_desc: Friends S and T appear, have conversation; then vanish along with cigarette
adjudicator_note: A codes across two excerpts (friends appearing + friends vanishing with cigarette) as incrusted hallucinations of acquaintances and artefacts; B does not individuate this rich scene.

canonical_desc: Play structure parts flipping him off / smiling / shadow is a cloud dragon
adjudicator_note: B codes this play-structure-anthropomorphisation passage as incrusted. A codes the same passage at trip-level as 'biological projection' (see trip-level a02, a04) not as a scene.

canonical_desc: Post-trip inability to read rest of the night
adjudicator_note: B codes the reading impairment as a visual illusion. As with Brugmansia_02 S06, this is borderline — a perceptual/executive deficit rather than added content.

canonical_desc: Flashes of light / sparkles in vision
Everything turning to jello visually
adjudicator_note: A codes the jello-visuals as illusion; B does not.

canonical_desc: Giant spider running in circles in living room; hisses when approached
adjudicator_note: Same giant-spider scene. Both agree incrusted+insect. A adds modal-status impossible-event; B adds auditory-insect (the hissing). These are complementary captures of the same scene's multimodal attributes.

canonical_desc: Talking to J then realises J is 30 feet behind; had been conversing with a non-existent companion
adjudicator_note: A picks up the vanishing-conversation-partner episode as an incrusted hallucination of an acquaintance; B does not individuate it.

canonical_desc: The moon dips, shoots up, and flies across the sky
adjudicator_note: Same moon passage. Both agree incrusted. A adds inorganic-entity leaf + impossible-event modal status.

canonical_desc: Squiggly lines in a square shape in peripheral vision
adjudicator_note: Same squiggles-in-peripheral-vision scene. Both agree geometrical-pattern. A adds detached-object + impossible-event.

canonical_desc: Talking to imaginary people in the tent; waiting for responses that don't come
adjudicator_note: Same imaginary-people scene. Strong agreement on incrusted+unknown-person. A adds modal status.

canonical_desc: Wakes to hearing J whisper his name repeatedly; J denies having spoken
adjudicator_note: Same whispering-name scene. A correctly codes as AUDITORY hallucination of an acquaintance. B miscodes as VISUAL — classification error (the scene is explicitly auditory in the narrative).

canonical_desc: Blows on logs to flare up a fire that isn't in the tent
adjudicator_note: Same non-existent-fire scene. Both agree incrusted. A adds artefact/tool (odd fit — a fire isn't a tool or cloth) + modal status.

canonical_desc: Kept seeing 6-7 people in the tent when there were only 3
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-people-count scene. Both agree unknown-person. A adds incrusted + modal status.

canonical_desc: In the morning: two people come into tent and have sex in front of him; imaginary person sits next to him
adjudicator_note: Same tent-sex-people scene. Both agree unknown-person. A adds incrusted + improbable-event.

canonical_desc: No depth perception; everything looks blurry / with fuzz growing on it
adjudicator_note: Same passage. Full agreement on illusion.

canonical_desc: Sees own reflection in mirror as a Cheshire-cat-like feline; tries to pet it
adjudicator_note: Same Cheshire-cat-in-mirror scene. Disagreement on alteration type (illusion vs incrusted) and object class (B explicitly codes mammal; A does not). A's 'amnesia' code here is misplaced — the passage is about the moment of misrecognition, not memory loss. B's classification is arguably more accurate (the cat is a new object in place of his face).

canonical_desc: CD player disappears when looked at again
adjudicator_note: A codes the vanishing CD player; B does not individuate.

canonical_desc: Apparitions of parents walking into and out of room through a door that never opens
adjudicator_note: Same parents-apparitions scene. Both agree acquaintance. A adds incrusted + modal status.

canonical_desc: Eating food that isn't there; bread turns into a marker and disappears
adjudicator_note: Same imaginary-food scene. Disagreement on object class: A says artefact-other (food/markers as man-made objects), B says inorganic-entity-other. Both are reasonable, but artefact fits bread/marker better. A adds incrusted + modal.

canonical_desc: Believed his parents had come home (they had not); had imaginary greeting / interaction with them
adjudicator_note: A codes the phantom-parents-arriving scene; B does not individuate it, although it is one of the more striking hallucinations in the narrative.

canonical_desc: Vague memory of talking to people all afternoon
adjudicator_note: Same 'talking to people all afternoon' passage. Both agree it involved unknown persons. B additionally codes auditory (talking = speech = auditory) which is a reasonable capture A missed. A codes incrusted + modal. B codes amnesia at scene-level (should arguably be trip-level).

canonical_desc: During phone call to Lauren, repeatedly paused to talk to imaginary people in the room
adjudicator_note: Same phone-call-with-phantom-people scene. Both agree unknown-person visual; B correctly adds auditory. A adds incrusted + modal.

canonical_desc: 5-6 friends walk in and hang out like at a small party for ~20 minutes
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-friends-visit scene. Both agree acquaintance visual; B correctly adds auditory. A adds incrusted + modal.

canonical_desc: Life flashes before eyes; sees friends and relatives waving goodbye, crying, grieving
adjudicator_note: Same opening-scene. Both code full-blown immersive + acquaintance + impossible. A additionally captures the auditory component (crying) and object-constancy — both valid; B missed them.

canonical_desc: Being dragged down a corridor by a force; then free-floating / moving fast
adjudicator_note: Same corridor + dragging-force + free-floating scene. MAJOR classification disagreement on the force: A codes it as NONSENSORY hallucination of extraordinary entity; B codes it as TACTILE hallucination of extraordinary entity. The narrative text 'dragging me down' supports tactile (B). A also codes the corridor itself as a visual-artefact and the movement-feeling as visual-inorganic; B instead captures the overall immersive quality.

canonical_desc: T-Junction with dark evil left / light divine right; feelings contrast radically between sides
adjudicator_note: Same T-Junction scene. Both code full-blown immersive. Disagreement on modal status: A=impossible, B=possible-but-improbable (reasonable disagreement for an NDE). A additionally codes T-junction as 'geometrical pattern' (literal but arguably over-literal — T is a shape), and codes darkness/light/tunnel as inorganic-entity and artefact sub-objects. B treats it holistically.

canonical_desc: Great wind-force approaches with sound, arrives, hits him, sent back to consciousness
adjudicator_note: Same wind-force scene. Both code auditory + visual inorganic. A additionally captures the tactile modality (wind 'hitting' him) which B missed.

canonical_desc: Girlfriend appears sitting on end of bed; disappears when touched
adjudicator_note: Same girlfriend-on-bed scene. Both agree incrusted + acquaintance. Disagreement on modal status: A=impossible, B=possible-and-probable.

canonical_desc: During sleep cycles, sees different people in room (girlfriend's mom, friend) who turn out to be a chair and a pile of blanket respectively
adjudicator_note: Same sleep-cycle scene. Both agree acquaintance visual. B adds incrusted + modal. Arguably this is an ILLUSION (mistaking a chair for a person) rather than an incrusted hallucination (adding a person); neither rater captured that distinction.

canonical_desc: Eating cheese pizza in bed; tastes it; pizza slides down gap and is gone
adjudicator_note: Same cheese-pizza scene. Both agree gustatory. Major disagreement on type-of-alteration: A=incrusted, B=full-blown-immersive. A captures more modalities (tactile, visual artefact) and dynamics (no constancy) that B omits.

canonical_desc: Doing crosswords in newspaper; newspaper slides down gap, pen lost after
adjudicator_note: Same newspaper-sliding scene. Disagreement on type-of-alteration (incrusted vs full-blown immersive). A codes many more attributes.

canonical_desc: Facing tv smoking a cigarette; puts it under blanket; realises no cigarette exists
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-cigarette scene. Same pattern as S03/S04: disagreement on alteration type.

canonical_desc: Preacher woman on TV; believes she is talking to HIM personally, eyes follow him, threatens hell
adjudicator_note: Same preacher-on-TV scene. Both agree auditory hallucination of an unknown person. B additionally codes the visual component (the preacher appearing to look at him) + modal. The preacher is a real TV image — the hallucinatory element is that she is talking to him; B's coding is broader but arguably over-captures since the visual part isn't strictly hallucinated. A codes it at trip-level as psychological projection (a06) which is the most accurate framing.

canonical_desc: Woke up thinking he was at his girlfriend's house
adjudicator_note: B codes the spatial-disorientation as an illusion; A codes only at trip-level (a05 Delusional).

canonical_desc: Two star-incidents lumped together in A's individuation: (i) star at end of pen whirls out window, (ii) star shoots out of stereo display. A treated these as one scene; B split them into two separate scenes. This parent record covers A's lumped scope.
adjudicator_note: Parent lump: A quoted both star incidents together in one excerpt; B quoted them in two separate excerpts that together cover the same narrative span.

canonical_desc: Child 1 of S08 lump: star appears at end of pen, whirls, shoots out window
adjudicator_note: B's first split; A's lump covers this via A18.

canonical_desc: Child 2 of S08 lump: star shoots out of stereo display in the dark; moves wherever he isn't looking
adjudicator_note: B's second split; A's lump covers this via A18.

canonical_desc: Mirror reflection of himself is shirtless after he has put his shirt on
adjudicator_note: Same shirtless-mirror-self scene. Disagreement on alteration: A=illusion (reflection misperceived), B=incrusted + unknown person (a new entity in the mirror). Either reading is defensible. B adds modal status.

canonical_desc: Believes a pen in his hand is the sandals he was looking for
adjudicator_note: A codes this pen/sandals misidentification at scene-level + trip-level delusional. B codes only at trip-level (b01 delusional) — a missed scene individuation.

canonical_desc: In the bathroom (locked) sees two friends: one watching him piss, another washing hands; has a conversation; friends vanish
adjudicator_note: Same bathroom-friends scene. Both agree incrusted + acquaintance. A correctly adds auditory (conversation) + no-object-constancy (he was gone after). Modal-status disagreement (improbable vs probable).

canonical_desc: In music store, friends at CD racks keep disappearing when he looks for them
adjudicator_note: B individuates the friends-disappearing-in-store scene; A does not code at scene-level (but codes related disappearance dynamics at trip-level).

canonical_desc: Believes he is driving his own car with friends in the back; reaches for brake pedal, steering wheel, instrument panel, sees brake lights of other cars
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-car scene. Disagreement on alteration type: A=incrusted (many small objects: wheel, dash, brake lights), B=full-blown immersive (he was fully convinced he was driving — an alternate reality). Both defensible. A captures tactile modality (reaching for controls) that B omits.

canonical_desc: Throughout the night, pulls (non-existent) cigarettes from empty pack, lights them, smokes them; hand shaped around cigarette
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-cigarette scene. Both agree tactile. Alteration disagreement (incrusted vs full-blown immersive). Same pattern as S05.

canonical_desc: Believes he went to bed stripped to boxers; wakes up sitting in desk chair fully clothed, smoking imaginary cigarette; repeats 3x
adjudicator_note: Same bed-vs-desk-chair scene. Same pattern: A=incrusted with object leaves, B=full-blown immersive.

canonical_desc: Shadow humanoid figures leap across ceiling; shadow head peeks from bedroom corners
adjudicator_note: Same shadow-figures scene. Disagreement on alteration type (detached vs incrusted) AND on object class: A=extraordinary entity (shadow beings), B=human-others (human figures). The narrator calls them 'shadows of human figures' — both readings defensible.

canonical_desc: Cat pouncing on stomach and digging under covers; grabs cat to put her out, only to find hand empty (cat was already out)
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-cat scene. Both agree mammal. Alteration disagreement (incrusted vs full-blown immersive). A adds amnesia (reasonable — he'd forgotten locking the cat out) and delusional.

canonical_desc: Girlfriend appears twice on other side of bed; touches her hair once; second time yells at her for hogging bed; she was not there
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-girlfriend-in-bed scene. Both agree acquaintance visual. B correctly adds tactile (touched her hair) which A missed. B also adds incrusted + modal.

canonical_desc: Billiard ball perceived as an apple, almost bitten
adjudicator_note: A individuates the billiard-ball-as-apple as a scene; B does not.

canonical_desc: Sees friend's dad and greets him; friend says no one is there
adjudicator_note: Same scene. Both see acquaintance + incrusted.

canonical_desc: Believes he is playing guitar really well; realises his hands are in his pockets
adjudicator_note: Same scene. Both capture tactile modality.

canonical_desc: Friend walks him home for 15 min, disappears into thin air just before his house
adjudicator_note: Same phantom-friend-walks-home scene; A focuses on the disappearance, B on the walk. Same scene different aspects emphasised.

canonical_desc: At night, talks to imaginary people
adjudicator_note: Same imaginary-people scene. Attribute disagreements (detached vs incrusted; extraordinary-entity vs human-unknown) are left as rater subjectivity.

canonical_desc: Smoking an imaginary cigarette (he is a non-smoker)
adjudicator_note: Same imaginary-cigarette scene. Both capture tactile.

canonical_desc: Own mirror reflection perceived as one of his friends; has conversation with it until hand-gesture mirroring reveals it is himself
adjudicator_note: A individuated this as a scene; B did not.

canonical_desc: Two-hour conversation in bed with two imaginary friends on the floor
adjudicator_note: Same imaginary-friends scene. B captures acquaintance object-class. Modal-status disagreement (probable vs improbable) — rater subjectivity.

canonical_desc: Hallucinations of friends (who were in different cities) conversing and making plans; gone when looked back at
adjudicator_note: Both raters individuated this as a single scene. Attribute differences left as-is.

canonical_desc: Mistook canola cooking oil bottle for a drink and drank it (twice attempted)
adjudicator_note: A individuated this as a scene; B did not.

canonical_desc: Jake arrives with a group of unknown silent people; later realises it wasn't Jake
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this scene. A quoted later part (realisation); B quoted earlier part (arrival).

canonical_desc: Smoking imaginary cigarettes all night; ~6 unknown people in apartment
Silent people take the form of mental patients; lip-reading their non-sounds
Strange silent people take on horror-based figures
adjudicator_note: A individuated as a distinct scene; B did not (possibly treated as continuation of S03).

canonical_desc: Mental patients lying on floor beside bed after returning home
adjudicator_note: B individuated this as a separate scene at home; A did not.

canonical_desc: Two female mental patients at home (a pillow-headed one and a clock-headed one)
adjudicator_note: B individuated this as a separate detailed scene; A did not.

canonical_desc: White cobwebs layer on ceiling; possibly a spider
Naked blonde woman standing in the shower; repeated conversations
Feels someone's legs across his chest as if a person came in and slept in his bed
adjudicator_note: B individuated this as a scene; A did not.

canonical_desc: Pitch black room impaired vision (darkness coded as illusion)
Instead of seeing his friend on the floor, sees a kid from down the street + 3 other sleeping people
Returning to room still sees the person in the bed; then gone
adjudicator_note: B individuated this as a separate scene; A did not.

canonical_desc: Friend appearing in computer chair (repeatedly, while actually asleep on floor)
Roach on the window blinds
Two unknown people come out of sister's room asking for smoking materials
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this scene with matching attributes.

canonical_desc: A different friend appears beside him; asks for help finding joint; friend disappears/reappears
Wasps flying in room; a frog on the blind-string eats a wasp
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this scene with matching attributes.

canonical_desc: Morning arrives in discrete lighting-brightness waves rather than continuously
adjudicator_note: A individuated as illusion; B did not.

canonical_desc: Cosmic hum / organic buzzing / radio-static sound
Kaleidoscopic fractals/color/shapes swirling; edges of own body and blanket dissolving into shapes
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this scene. A fragments into many sub-object excerpts (blanket edges, body edges, shapes); B codes holistically as illusion. Plus B codes the same passage at trip-level as own-body-distortion + haptic delight.

canonical_desc: Main narrator voice + other voices + voices of people/entities + electronic music booming
adjudicator_note: A individuated the multiple-voices-and-music scene; B did not scene-code it.

canonical_desc: Presence of entities in the room with him; some visible as swirls, others formless
Thinking of people in his life — sees them and talks with them; also sees people he's never met and admires (including Erykah Badu voicing wisdoms)
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this combined 'people and voices' scene with similar auditory codes.

canonical_desc: Erotic dance with the entities; 'spotted' by outsiders; giggling and mutually admiring
adjudicator_note: A individuated this erotic-dance scene. B codes the same passage at trip-level as Sensory-delight/erotic, not scene-level.

canonical_desc: Breaking edges visible again when focusing later in the trip
adjudicator_note: A individuated as a distinct later scene; B did not.

canonical_desc: In bathroom: tile floor's tiny hair strands moving, ondulating, separating into edges
Visualises mycelium branching in disturbed earth connecting all beings
adjudicator_note: A individuated the mycelium visualisation as a scene. B codes the same passage at trip-level as Insight/Existential.

canonical_desc: Sky is unusually colourful
Tree with animated cortex + pine needles as sliding filaments
adjudicator_note: Both individuated; B's excerpt also encompasses the sky + tree together.

canonical_desc: Own hands transparent, milky, blue veins, tiny moving particles
Ground appears as mass of moving black shining worms
Fantasy world like Lord of the Rings (eyes closed)
Violent scream heard (auditory)
Trees become a vortex; fluorescent lines leaving traces on black screen following secret geometry
Walking in wood: brilliant green heart-shaped leaves, rain like ice needles, wind in dolby surround
Feeling of someone following behind him (but no one there)
Mexican environment perceived as extraordinarily colourful
Blanket with flowers fluctuating on it; merges with them
Feeling of being at a California party with many people and music; amplified echo-sounds
Visions of past parties and clubs
Own scent (and girlfriend's) strong like animals (olfactory)
Colourful visions of lights and luminous wires interweaving
Wall becomes liquid and transparent, water flowing into it
Hears voices outside as Chinese speakers under bamboo shelter, wind in bamboo
Colourful snakes moving in a pattern
Enters '2001: A Space Odyssey' immersively
Wood-board ceiling: veins and nodes floating
Wonderful dragons/demons flying, gold rings with gemstones whirling like snake skin forming esoteric symbol
Everything turns silver; opera-set leans toward audience
Virtual hexagonal room with dimensional-porthole round window leading to other worlds
Black heart-shaped obsidian in dark cave emanating evil; takes anthropomorphic black-fog form
Visual of dissolution of the body / end of everything (imagining death)
Palm lines change colour, rectangle of iridescent soft pulsing lines, hand as planet surface, dead hand
Stands before a board of spirits (unseen, audible); spirits discourse on interdimensional race, recalibration, mission
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this extended spirit-council scene.

canonical_desc: Sees himself on a high bridge pirouetting like a Cirque du Soleil acrobat
Hallmark shapes of the medicine spirit: fractal shapes, alternating zones of bright complementary colors
Sees spirits and a pesky demon; feels he and wife had been 'here before'
Words on the computer screen shimmer, flicker, then mutate wildly in rhythmic patterns
Friend's trippy-art images mutating, shimmering, melting, growing out and back
Pictures himself as a small child lost in space, flying into nether regions
Sun rising and setting repeatedly in background of picture; each component a breathing mass of cosmic sludge
A beautiful golden sun of geometric figures appears etched into the background of screen
Sinister cosmic black hole pulling away parts of ego
Indian jungle; black snakes slithering around; desk transforms into stone panther statue; hordes of faces cascading with sinister smiles
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this composite jungle scene; both captured multiple sub-objects. Alteration-type disagreement (detached vs full-blown immersive).

canonical_desc: Darkness around computer screen cycles between dark and dim light
Auditory hallucinations infiltrating thoughts (ghost voices of acquaintances)
Full 3D dream world with alien-like monstrosities (Lovecraftian), mutating quivering things staring back
Feels he stumbled upon a cosmic isle free of earthly properties
Street / patterned surfaces begin to roll and stretch like a calm sea
Speaking and hearing spoken words feels somewhat alien
Entering dark bathroom from bright sun: can't make out colors/shapes, black-brown haze
adjudicator_note: A individuated; B did not (possibly because this is a real light-adaptation effect, not a hallucination).

canonical_desc: Stall walls bending and rolling like sheet metal; wood-grain lines stretching and shrinking
Everything looks kind of glassy
Hallway shifts and starts to rock; lights shimmer and fade
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. A additionally captures the tactile (rocking) modality.

canonical_desc: Period-rush: for seconds feels he's really in prehistoric earth in front of T-rex
Sounds of people talking cease to be words and become pure sounds flowing around him
Running fingers across face leaves tactile tracers (feels fingers pressing after pulling away)
Waves of psychedelic energy manifest as 'wind' flowing through body
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Rater A tags tactile modality; rater B tags visual. Genuine modality disagreement on same scene.

canonical_desc: Visions plentiful but in black and white; feels ego being physically crushed like a can
Entity arrives; does rhythmic dance involving horrifying probes of his form; turns out to be a giant praying mantis with cartoon details
Drifts through outer space; sees stars, celestial bodies, molecules; charts the cosmos by rearranging stars, different arrangements produce different mental states
Round room; perimeter has Mayan-cartoon-dog creatures with dragging tongues and backward eyes; middle has indescribable entities; one is a Huichol-garbed Mexican man vomiting
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this composite round-room scene.

canonical_desc: Opium-poppy-like flowers surround him; DMT machine-elves arrive, sing in high-pitched collective voice about his DNA
Metallic cicada-like buzzing sound locked on to his hum; he feels as a bug making the sound; intuitive understanding of metamorphosis
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Object-class disagreement: A=animal/insect, B=extraordinary entity.

canonical_desc: Sculpts 3D objects of pure light and revolving spheres, towers of emerald surrounded by throbbing orbs of sound and love
Music turns things into dragons; own and sitter's hands look and feel like dragon's claws
Friend who told frog joke shows up in frog form a few times during session
Kaleidoscope-type visuals
Beautiful visual of living, breathing Earth with water flowing around and through it
Becoming part of a vast network of dancing pale green branches; limbs merging seamlessly
adjudicator_note: B individuated; A codes this at trip-level as ego-dissolution/bodily (a09).

canonical_desc: Abstract visual interpretations of music (sunlight-on-ripples analog)
Sitter / bedroom wall / surroundings familiar but distorted in space as if brain refused to do geometry
Beautiful fractal rainbow spiral world with sense of order and freedom
The words 'cosmic consciousness' appear visually, exactly as he'd written them earlier
Two friends appear in the fractal space: one as a frog, one dancing
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Note: B codes 'frog' as aquatic-animal (debatable — frogs are amphibians).

canonical_desc: Own consciousness manifests as loosely defined part of the fractal; candle-like light fading
Sees normal human waking life as a small dark loop in the pattern
Waves of rainbow pastel colors separate and replicate
Rising focusing energy; gives birth to the universe with ecstatic dancing
Lights dancing; Jimi Hendrix poster on wall is a 3D mosaic undulating
Cosmic winds blow through center of where he had been until nothing
adjudicator_note: A individuated; B codes this at trip-level as ego dissolution (b01).

canonical_desc: When he turned his gaze, darkness followed behind but what he looked at was illuminated
Sees another set of fingers floating above current set; friend's thumb appears inches from face though he is 6 feet away
Outlines in visual field become wavy/melting; notices intricate patterns in room, furniture, wood grain
Mirror reflection looks animalistic/mousy; shadowing, expression, outlines of face change and distort
Couch appears as size of skyscraper; or he was extremely tiny
Everything in visual field was breathing; objects animated; colors pop and change faintly
Hedges in yard spell out 'Ron Regan' (Lil' Wayne song lyric); auditory connection
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Major modality disagreement: A tags auditory-plant, B tags visual-illusion (the hedges spelling letters is visual, but A interpreted it through the song lyric context).

canonical_desc: Still-distorting houses and telephone poles seen from ambulance
Becomes aware of a loving, intelligent, ancient, alien presence not in room or head
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. B additionally codes visual alteration + object constancy.

canonical_desc: Patterns as geometric fractals with distinctly organic feel
Hears presence respond 'I am you and you are me'
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Disagreement on extraordinary-entity leaf (other vs alien).

canonical_desc: Blue tie-dye-like pattern with vibrant blues; gradient begins to ripple like a veil; rotation and spiral geometry
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this extended geometric pattern scene.

canonical_desc: Pine trees, sunflower carvings, birds, woodland creatures, rotating 3D crystals, 9 men on bicycles riding over mountains from web-strands
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this dense composite scene with many sub-objects. High object-class agreement.

canonical_desc: With the pulsing came recognizable images from our own world; completely let go
adjudicator_note: B individuated as transition scene; A absorbs this under S05.

canonical_desc: Entity takes his arms, pokes his face/chest while repeating 'you are the universe'
adjudicator_note: B individuated the possession/poking scene; A codes related insight at trip-level.

canonical_desc: Entity revealed with cuttlefish/octopus eyes, roundish head, golden/orange radiance like alive sun looking back
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Extraordinary-entity leaf disagreement (other vs alien).

canonical_desc: Within 10 minutes things getting colorful
Full kaleidoscope of spinning glowing pinwheels throughout scope of vision
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Disagreement on object-constancy (A says no, B says yes).

canonical_desc: Disperses into black microscopic crystals across a dark void; floats in void; exists only as essence, everything that exists
Coalesces back into two selves; has conversation with 'trip Doug' who reveals they met 20 years ago at Fire Island
Two parallel universes sitting next to each other, can see them both
adjudicator_note: B individuated; A codes related insight at trip-level.

canonical_desc: Kaleidoscope patterns resume as he merges with trip-Doug
Swimming through blue geometric domino-like objects with Z-shaped white/blue morphing patterns; smooth, felt on skin, dripped off fingers
adjudicator_note: Both individuated the swimming-through-geometry scene with tactile component.

canonical_desc: Wife has sparkling halo around her body form, shimmers like a mirage
Everything takes on shimmering saturated jungle lushness
Watercolor of red apples on emerald green geometric background boils and moves in hypnotic chaotic madness
Paintings of old German towns on the wall come alive with people walking in them
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Type-of-alteration disagreement (incrusted vs illusion); dynamics disagreement (no-constancy vs constancy).

canonical_desc: Long blue hairs/tentacles reach down towards his face; feels them; become black octopus consuming him
In a place full of faces and rooms; wanted to see own face; sees wife's face instead
At his own funeral staring at wife's crying face being hugged by mourners
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Dynamics disagreement (no-constancy vs constancy).

canonical_desc: Watches first two cells split; consciousness builds human mind from various things
Transported to another world made of shallow water with metal fan-blade parts flowing in and out
House is very psychedelic and trippy
Blankets are clouds with little machines running through them; wood floors and dresser become rave of moving lines
Has ape hands; sees memory of himself as an ape eating mushrooms
Orange splits into two halves that become two brains (smaller old, larger new)
Room bursts into million colors and crazy patterns
Peeled banana has streaks of red and purple (tie-dye colors)
Feels electricity in the back of his head during storm
First flashes of pastel colors dance behind eyelids
Strange irregularity in heartbeat / cardiac arrhythmia feeling
adjudicator_note: B individuated as a scene; A did not.

canonical_desc: Realizes 'it was my turn to die'
Horrific feeling of being violated and examined by invisible forces
Stream of terrifying imagery spreads all around: occult symbols, sigils, hieroglyphs, cuneiform, flaming chariots, horned goats, snakes, angels
adjudicator_note: Both individuated this composite apocalyptic-imagery scene with many sub-objects. Alteration-type disagreement (immersive vs detached). Object-classes overlap heavily.

canonical_desc: Ink appears to touch paper before pen hits, letters spill in slow motion, page looks made of radiant liquid light
Looking into tree, limbs seem to pull away from him and each other
Sun has awesome presence: warm, powerful, God-like
Scenery changed, nothing sits in space normally, nothing stationary
Rush of geometric flowing orange/yellow/red patterns behind eyelids
Sees images of Buddha, Jesus and other unidentified figures
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Entity-leaf disagreement (other vs god).

canonical_desc: Friends' yells reverberate and he felt them all around him
Sees reflections of himself on either side; bush and tree multiply infinitely
Asks 'Who am I?' and hears inner voices answering 'Gregg Dix' through to 'no one'
Enters strange world in head filled with language, numbers, confusion
Everything in life was elaborate lie; was primitive mind; became one with something else
adjudicator_note: B individuated; A codes at trip-level as ego dissolution.

canonical_desc: Yelps of coyotes and reverberating auditory hallucinations during sunset
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Animal leaf disagreement (mammal vs other).

canonical_desc: Runs thinking Jeff is make-believe; everything around bends and melts
Walking up hill, trees melted and bent around him; Jeff and the light the only stationary things
Strange reality: street lights bent, cars flew through houses, stars fell
Poked head from blanket: strange orange dawn-like place, no longer night
Friends return: figures stretching from normal height to ten feet tall
Bricks on wall take on carpet-like texture as he stares
Sees outlines of numbers, a strange face, and moving patterns on wall
Trees outside loomed at him vibrant and alive
Hidden patterns on floor including etheric forms of two figures embracing each other
Alex Grey's website: couldn't tell if pictures were actually moving animations or not
Tiny spiders crawling across vision
adjudicator_note: (Actually only_A — B did not code tiny spiders at scene level.)

canonical_desc: Closed-eye imaginative imagery: anything he thinks of appears behind eyelids, vivid and psychedelic; 'carnival of the strange' atmosphere
Pressing fingers into desk: resistance perceived as non-spatial pure sensation (dimensionless)
Language devolves into glossolalia soup; bringing up random images (blackboard, chalk, dog barking)
Newspapers on table defy gravity, flap gently as if from a breeze
PC screen appears as kaleidoscope of colors, beehive of intricate 'networks' like stars of color on a blank pallet
Sees Quetzalcoatl (snake god of Aztecs) in distance, approaching; body of multi-polygon Rubik's-cube-like formation; peers at him, lifts him
Dies and disintegrates into pieces; grew 6 extra arms; feels broken body; hears parents' voices asking 'what is wrong with you son?'
Fan spawns flaming Pentagram; Satan appears as a face from pentagram, laughs, goes away
Quetzalcoatl reappears, morphs room: walls split, windows become flapping mirrors, door missing knob
Journeys out of Earth into other planets to see other terrestrial life
Starry night sky expands and contracts in rhythm with breathing
Grass arranges itself in geometric patterns while walking; patterns become more organized and permanent
Fuzzy edge of scarf appears as large white spider ambling along to his left
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Type-of-alteration disagreement (detached vs illusion).

canonical_desc: Bright blue galaxy with yellow Mario stars transposed over night sky between two palm trees
Jaguar's eyes staring back at him from horizon on city skyline
Outlines of spiders on both peaks of Squaw Peak
Green light of smoke detector makes a peace sign
adjudicator_note: Both individuated. Object-class disagreement (geometrical-pattern vs human-others).

canonical_desc: Words moving across computer screen making them hard to read
Circle of light on roof is turning clockwise, then counter-clockwise
Portraits on wall seem pleased with his efforts to entertain the stern one
Tendrils of light above ripple with his exhale breath
Sensory perception off scale: running stairs up feels light, down feels heavy, sinking into bed continues; pushes skin like putty
adjudicator_note: B individuated; A codes at trip-level as own-body-distortion.

canonical_desc: If stops moving, de-animates into stone
Body feels split into two like shedding a cocoon
Tells self he is a feather; becomes very light and blown across room; then becomes tree, mushroom, French Informant, paratrooper, shadow
Outside feels like afterlife: still, void of life, worn down, no leaves
Shadow on railing is ball-shaped, mistakes own body for ball-shaped: I am now Humpty Dumpty
Every word he says to friend on phone influences his own reality; asking to slow down slows him down
Water from faucet splashes then freezes within seconds; coincides with song slowdown; time stops until track restarts
Vision a bit distorted; colors more defined; porch lights brighter
Pronounced tracers from D's rave lights
Finger lights stay in his vision for many seconds after he stops moving them
Ground feels like it bends under his weight and pushes him back up while hopping
World seems to fly by as they run; legs don't exist for moments, floating
adjudicator_note: A individuated; B codes at trip-level.

canonical_desc: Empty parking lot appears unusually large
Stars appear spacey purple, twinkling like never before
Electric jolt in mouth whenever mushroom taste felt strongest
Two trees ~50 feet away moving a lot despite still air; look like two people making out
Believed he pissed and shat all over his pants; later found perfectly clean
Houses they pass grow, shrink, melt, morph
Guitar bending and twisting; fingers growing and shrinking; plays accurately anyway
Looking in mirror: pupils growing/shrinking freely; nose end grows longer, swells inflated, returns normal
Lights fade in/out slowly with 1-minute delay after switch is flipped
